name: Corn Chowder
recipeIngredient: 1/3 cup Quaker Oats, uncooked (quick or old-fashioned)
1 can Whole kernel corn; undrained (7 to 8-3/4 oz. can)
recipeInstructions:
1. Place oats in blender container or food processor bowl and cover. Blend or process for about 1 minute, stopping occasionally to stir.
2. In a large saucepan, fry bacon until crisp. Set aside. Pour off all but 2 tablespoons drippings.
3. Sauté celery in the remaining drippings. Add oat flour.
4. Gradually add water and milk, stirring constantly over medium heat until thickened.
5. Reduce heat to low. Add reserved bacon, corn, and mustard. Cook for about 5 minutes or until heated through.
6. Remove from heat. Stir in cheese until well blended.
ABOUT SIX 1 CUP SERVINGS
NUTRITIONAL ANALYSIS per serving:
calories 287
carbohydrates 13 g
protein 16 g
fat 19 g
calcium 383 mg
sodium 490 mg
cholesterol 60 mg
dietary fiber 3 g
